steps: Oxidize in periodic acid solution for 5 minutes
Place in Coleman’s Schiff reagent for 15 minutes
Rinse in running tap water for 10 minutes
Counterstain in Harris Hematoxylin for 3 minutes
Wash in running tap water until water runs clear
Rinse in running tap water for 30 seconds
10 dips in 1% Ammonia water for 30 seconds
creator: Amanda Knoten
